findings.title: hpcaitech/ColossalAI
findings.description: Making large AI models cheaper, faster and more accessible

findings.title: meta-llama/llama-cookbook
findings.description: Welcome to the Llama Cookbook! This is your go to guide for Building with Llama: Getting started with Inference, Fine-Tuning, RAG. We also show you how to solve end to end problems using Llama model family and using them on various provider services

findings.title: bentoml/BentoML
findings.description: The easiest way to serve AI apps and models - Build Model Inference APIs, Job queues, LLM apps, Multi-model pipelines, and more!

findings.title: leejet/stable-diffusion.cpp
findings.description: Diffusion model(SD,Flux,Wan,Qwen Image,Z-Image,...) inference in pure C/C++

findings.title: winfunc/deepreasoning
findings.description: A high-performance LLM inference API and Chat UI that integrates DeepSeek R1's CoT reasoning traces with Anthropic Claude models.

findings.title: OpenCSGs/csghub
findings.description: CSGHub is a brand-new open-source platform for managing LLMs, developed by the OpenCSG team. It offers both open-source and on-premise/SaaS solutions, with features comparable to Hugging Face. Gain full control over the lifecycle of LLMs, datasets, and agents, with Python SDK compatibility with Hugging Face. Join us! ⭐️

findings.title: gpustack/gpustack
findings.description: A GPU cluster manager that configures and orchestrates inference engines like vLLM and SGLang for high-performance AI model deployment.

findings.title: huggingface/text-embeddings-inference
findings.description: A blazing fast inference solution for text embeddings models

findings.title: Lagrange-Labs/deep-prove
findings.description: Framework to prove inference of ML models blazingly fast

findings.title: zml/zml
findings.description: Any model. Any hardware. Zero compromise. Built with @ziglang / @openxla / MLIR / @bazelbuild

findings.title: containers/ramalama
findings.description: RamaLama is an open-source developer tool that simplifies the local serving of AI models from any source and facilitates their use for inference in production, all through the familiar language of containers.

findings.title: pykeio/ort
findings.description: Fast ML inference & training for ONNX models in Rust

findings.title: Bytez-com/docs
findings.description: 1 API key. 220,000+ AI models. Bytez is the largest serverless Model Inference API on the internet. Let's build ✨

findings.title: trymirai/uzu
findings.description: A high-performance inference engine for AI models

findings.title: microsoft/edgeai-for-beginners
findings.description: This course is designed to guide beginners through the exciting world of Edge AI, covering fundamental concepts, popular models, inference techniques, device-specific applications, model optimization, and the development of intelligent Edge AI agents.

findings.title: OpenCSGs/csghub-server
findings.description: csghub-server is the backend server for CSGHub which helps user to manage datasets, modes, and also run Model Inference, Finetune and Application Spaces.

findings.title: zkonduit/ezkl
findings.description: ezkl is an engine for doing inference for deep learning models and other computational graphs in a zk-snark (ZKML). Use it from Python, Javascript, or the command line.

findings.title: kubeai-project/kubeai
findings.description: AI Inference Operator for Kubernetes. The easiest way to serve ML models in production. Supports VLMs, LLMs, embeddings, and speech-to-text.

findings.title: replit/ReplitLM
findings.description: Inference code and configs for the ReplitLM model family

findings.title: awslabs/multi-model-server
findings.description: Multi Model Server is a tool for serving neural net models for inference
